programme.title: Ghost Adventures
programme.desc: Det frygtløse hold bag Ghost Adventures er tilbage! I hver episode rejser spøgelsesjægerne Zak Bagans og Aaron Goodwin sammen med teknikerne Billy Tolley og Jay Wasley til en hjemsøgt destination, hvor de mødes med lokale, øjenvidner og eksperter for at undersøge spøgelseshistorierne fra hvert sted. Ved hjælp af den nyeste, videnskabelige teknologi og gadgets sætter holdet deres efterforskning i gang om natten, hvor de konfronterer den paranormale aktivitet og dokumenterer beviserne i håbet om at afdække sandheden bag hvert af de hjemsøgende mysterier.

programme.title: Star Trek Beyond
programme.desc: Det er blevet tid til at gense den modige besætning på U.S.S. Enterprise. I stjernetågen bliver Enterprise angrebet af en sværm af små skibe, som sammen tvinger Enterprise på flugt, svært beskadiget, og med store dele af besætningen taget til fange. Enterprise styrter ned på samme planet og bliver smadret, hvilket tvinger Kaptajn Kirk og de resterende besætningsmedlemmer til at forsøge at befri deres kammerater.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: Tanked dumber seerne ned i de mest spændende akvarier. Acrylic Tank Manufacturing, ATM er verdensmestre i akvarier! De har kreeret de mest banebrydende og ekstraordinære akvarier. Kunderne er krævende og lokationen nogle gange ligeså. Holdet rejser landet rundt for at bringe havet i øjenhøjde på gæster, som besøger så forskellige steder, som casinoer, kirker, museer og zoologiske haver.

programme.title: Animal Cops Houston
programme.desc: I dette særafsnit ser vi, hvordan dyrepolitiet i Houston tackler den chokerende dyremishandling hos folk, der har samlermani.

programme.title: Animal Cops Houston
programme.desc: Efterforskerne må af sted, da de hører om et stort antal hunde, der holdes fanget under kummerlige forhold. Og Octavio Gonzales får oplysninger om en efterladt hest.

programme.title: Animal ER
programme.desc: Da hestelægen David Sutton hjælper Tilly, en 10 år gammel hoppe, som har græssyge og ikke har spist noget i to uger, kommer hendes ejere til at stå over for et hjerteskærende valg.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People
programme.desc: I denne helt unikke række af programmer, afsløres hidtil usete optagelser af familien Brown imens de gør sig klar til den første sommer. Derudover vises et eksklusivt smugkig på de kommende afsnit.

programme.title: Min umulige kat
programme.desc: Katteadfærdseksperten Jackson Galaxy hjælper familier med at kurere deres uregerlige kæledyr – lige fra katte, der ødelægger forhold, til voldelige dyr.

programme.title: Crikey! Its the Irwins
programme.desc: Terry, Bindi og Robert Irwin fører Steve Irwins arv videre med deres arbejde i den omfattende australske zoo.

programme.title: The Zoo
programme.desc: Kom med på en anderledes tur i zoologisk have, hvor Jurgen og hans besynderlige gorillaflok afslører en hemmelig verden af talende dyr. Fra skildpadder der beatboxer, til menneskelignende pingviner, fra vegetar-løver til maniske mini-aber - alt er muligt her i zoo.

programme.title: Preposterous Pets
programme.desc: Mød verdens mest utrolige kæledyr og deres ejere, og find ud af, hvad der har fået dem til at udvikle ubrydelige bånd med nogle af de vildeste og farligste dyr.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff og hans dedikerede medarbejdere fra Planned Pethood Plus tager alle slags dyrepatienter under kærlig behandling i Denver, Colorado.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: Tanked dumber seerne ned i de mest spændende akvarier. Acrylic Tank Manufacturing, ATM er verdensmestre i akvarier! De har kreeret de mest banebrydende og ekstraordinære akvarier. programme.title: Animal Cops Phoenix
programme.desc: Efterforsker Barkley finder to hunde, der er ved at dø i varmen. Og efterforskerne skal håndtere en kvinde, som elsker dyr, men ikke er så god til at tage sig af dem.

programme.title: Animal Cops Phoenix
programme.desc: McHugh gør sit bedste for at undgå at blive kørt ned, da hun skal redde en hund, der har begivet sig ud på motorvejen. Senere hjælper hun en chihuahua med en skade på rygsøjlen.

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: Vi følger en politipatrulje i Texas, som beskytter mere end en kvart million kvadratkilomteter med både ørken, floder, skove og kyst.

programme.title: The Vet Life
programme.desc: Den charmerende og sjove dyrelæge Blue og hans kollegaer har viet deres liv til at hjælpe dyr i nød. Kom med når vi følger deres fascinerende liv dyrenes små og store kampe.

programme.title: Animal Cribs
programme.desc: Antonio, hans projektleder Grace og hans højre hånd bulldog Chewie omdanner områder til funktionelle rum for både kæledyr og de mennesker, de elsker.

programme.title: Pitbulls og prøveløsladte
programme.desc: På sit dyreinternat Villalobos Rescue Centre fortsætter pitbull-træneren Tia Maria Torres sine bestræbelser på at udrydde de udbredte misforståelser om pitbull terrierne.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End
programme.desc: Prisvindende swinningpool-designer Lucas Congdon laver helt almindelige haver om til eksotiske oaser. Lucas Congdon og hans hold kreerer det ene lille paradis efter det andet med naturens materialer, seriøse maskiner og stor opfindsomhed. Kun fantasien og kundens økonomi sætter grænsen. Det sidste er til tider Lucas største udfordring.

programme.desc: Se de dødsforagtende og bevægende historier om dem, som trodser hindringer og konsekvenser og bare VIL overleve efter at være blevet angrebet af et dyr.

programme.title: Dyrepolitiet i Houston
programme.desc: Dokumentar om arbeidet som legges ned hos dyrepolitiet i Houston, fra tidlig etterforskning og frem til dyrene blir adopterte inn i sine fremtidige hjem.

programme.desc: Dokumentar om arbeidet som legges ned hos dyrepolitiet i Houston, fra tidlig etterforskning og frem til dyrene blir adopterte inn i sine fremtidige hjem.

programme.title: Animal ER
programme.desc: Følg med til smådyrssykehuset i Glasgow, med sine topp moderne operasjonssaler, der de jobber med å redde alle typer smådyr.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People
programme.desc: Bli med familien Brown til villmarken i Alaska. De er en familie med syv barn som lever i utkanten av sivilisasjonen og er avhengige av hverandre for å overleve.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell
programme.desc: Dorothy og Travis katt kaster opp i sinne og angriper dem. De er redd sønnen deres blir det neste offeret. Jackson må ta i bruk all sin erfaring for å ta seg av denne katten.

programme.title: Crikey! It’s The Irwins
programme.desc: Irwin-familien - Terry, Bindi og Robert - fører Steve Irwins arv videre gjennom arbeidet i Australia Zoo.

programme.title: The Zoo
programme.desc: Bli med til en helt unik dyrehage der Jurgen og de sprøe gorillavennene hans viser oss en skjult verden med snakkende dyr. Fra skilpadder som beatboxer til menneskelige pingviner, vegetarløver og bittesmå, spinnville aper, alt går an i dyrehagen.

programme.title: Preposterous Pets
programme.desc: Møt verdens mest utrolige kjæledyr og eierne deres, og se hva som gjorde at disse menneskene utviklet et ubrytelig bånd til noen av de skumleste, villeste og mannevonde dyrene som finnes.

programme.title: Dyrlegen i Rocky Mountain
programme.desc: Klinikken Denver’s Planned Pethood Plus og veterinær Dr. Jeff Young representerer et siste håp, og muligens forskjellen på liv og død, for klinikkens kunder og deres kjæledyr.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans
programme.desc: The Last Alaskans følger fire familier som har valgt å leve svært isolert. De må overvinne tøffe arktiske forhold, frustrerende tilbakeslag og aggressive dyr, og hver dag er en kamp i en av de siste store, uberørte villmarkene på planeten.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People

programme.title: Im Alive
programme.desc: Rekonstruksjon og intervju med mennesker som har hatt nær-døden opplevelser med angrep av ville dyr. Her forteller de historiene om deres egne opplevelser, samt om hvordan de oppdaget sider med seg selv som hjalp dem holde seg i live.

programme.title: Deadly Islands
programme.desc: I denne nye orginalserien fra Discovery reiser den anerkjente Zoologen og rovdyrseksperten Dave Salmoni til de fjerneste, villeste øyene på planeten vår og ser på suksessen til naturens mest tilpasningsdyktige drapsmaskiner.

programme.desc: Her får du høre virkelige historier om dyr som tar over folks hjem. Fra kakerlakker og rotter til bjørner som bryter seg inn - dette er gjester du ikke så lett blir kvitt.

programme.title: Meet The Sloths
programme.desc: In a sleepy corner of Costa Rica there is a very peculiar but extraordinary sanctuary. Run by Judy Avey-Arroyo for 20 years, this is the only sanctuary in the world devoted to saving orphaned and injured sloths, and is home to over 160 of them, some of whom have become an internet sensation.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: The long-running game show sees more rival antique collectors test their skills at spotting a bargain. Two teams - the reds and the blues - set out with just £300 and one hour to scour an antiques fair and buy three items to sell at auction. An antiques expert guides each team, giving them hints and tips on what to buy in the hope they make more profit than their rivals when their items go under the hammer.

programme.desc: Americans Hanna and Liv are best friends backpacking in Australia. After they run out of money, Liv, looking for an adventure, convinces Hanna to take a temporary live-in job behind the bar of a pub called The Royal Hotel in a remote Outback mining town. Bar owner Billy and a host of locals give the girls a riotous introduction to Down Under drinking culture but soon Hanna and Liv find themselves trapped in an unnerving situation that grows rapidly out of their control.

programme.title: Life Below Zero

programme.title: Mysteries Of The Pyramids with Dara OBriain

programme.title: Inside Our Minds

programme.title: Kingdom
programme.desc: A story of power and survival filmed across 5 years in a single spectacular location, where the fates of 4 rival families are inextricably linked. As the dramatic rise of wild dog queen Storm sends ripples of chaos through the Kingdom, the jostle for dominance between Rita’s lion pride and Tenta’s hyena clan contrasts with their gentleness as mothers; while solitary leopard Olimba attempts to bring up her cubs in the midst of the turmoil. Who can rule this precious Kingdom?

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: One of the most famous bibliographic references of all time, George Bradshaws Guide to the Continental Railway, serves as the guidebook for this documentary series. A total of five episodes will showcase the different European routes covered in this guide, published in 1913, which marked a turning point for British tourists during the Edwardian era. Gleaming cosmopolitan cities, alpine landscapes, warm, sparkling seas, and picturesque villages are some of the places Bradshaw describes in his book, known precisely for sparking an interest among English citizens in the exoticism of foreign travel.

From towering mountains to vast deserts, he reveals the powerful forces at work in nature—and how they connect us to the wonders of the cosmos.

Guided by Chris, the project helps them communicate thoughts and emotions they’ve struggled to share, offering their families and friends a deeper understanding of their world—and revealing the rich, complex lives often hidden beneath the surface.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Deep in Alaska, the primal way lives on. Fight the freeze, brave the wild, hold on to your sanity. And winter is no wonderland when temperatures plummet far below zero. This series follows the drama and hardships experienced by Alaskan households in different corners of this merciless territory as they battle to survive, thrive, and live life on their own terms.

programme.title: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild
programme.desc: Ben Fogle meets people from all over the world who have given up the rat race to start a new life in the wild.

programme.title: Wonders of the Solar System
programme.desc: In this captivating series, Professor Brian Cox journeys to some of Earth’s most dramatic and remote landscapes to uncover how the fundamental laws of physics have shaped not only our planet, but the entire solar system. From towering mountains to vast deserts, he reveals the powerful forces at work in nature—and how they connect us to the wonders of the cosmos.

programme.title: Rachel Khoos Kitchen Notebook
programme.desc: Passionate and creative cook Rachel Khoo goes in search of new ideas in this vibrant and fascinating series. Rachel travels to some of the most beautiful foodie countries in the world, heading for cosmopolitan locations both urban and rural to get inspiration for dinner parties with her friends back home. Rachel gets under the skin of the local cuisine, showing two very different culinary influences, such as Barcelona and rural Spain, or in Italy, Naples and the Amalfi coast.

programme.title: Arts In Motion
programme.desc: Arts in Motion is a thrilling series, showcasing renowned cultural figures sharing their insights with the next generation. This series will encompass multiple disciplines, including dance, music, visual art and performance-based work. Each episode centres around a masterclass led by a major cultural figure working with aspiring artists at the beginning of their careers. This unique opportunity allows young creatives to learn from a world-leading artist and refine their craft.

programme.title: Amanda og Alans italienske drøm
programme.desc: Amanda Holden køber to nedslidte lejligheder for en euro hver i det idylliske Sicilien og overtaler bedstevennen Alan Carr til at bruge hele sommeren med at forvandle lejlighederne til et italiensk drømmehus.

programme.title: Kendisbagedysten
programme.desc: Kendisbagere træder ind i det berømte telt og sætter deres bagefærdigheder på prøve i forsøget på at indsamle penge til velgørenhed.

programme.title: Rick Stein og det forunderlige Frankrig
programme.desc: Rick Stein begiver sig ud på et nyt kulinarisk eventyr for at søge efter Frankrigs bedst bevarede gastronomiske hemmeligheder.

programme.title: Den iskolde vildmark
programme.desc: Det ekstreme liv i Alaska. Vintrene i Alaska er ekstremt barske med temperaturer helt ned under minus 62 grader. Følg fire familier, der er bosat i forskellige hjørner af Alaska, og deres kamp for at komme helskindet igennem den lange, ubarmhjertige vinter i området.

programme.title: Rejseman: 48 timer i ...
programme.desc: Travel Man er en serie, der tilbyder en unik guide til de ultimative 48 timer i en by. Hver uge besøger skuespilleren og instruktøren Richard Ayoade og en kendis en ny destination.

programme.title: De britiske antikskatte
programme.desc: Eksperter inviterer offentligheden til at medbringe deres antikviteter til undersøgelse. Nogle finder, at deres bric-a-brac er meget mere værd, end de nogensinde havde anet.

programme.title: Den store britiske bagedyst
programme.desc: 12 deltagere konkurrerer om at blive Storbritanniens bedste amatørbager. Undervejs møder de udfordringer, der sætter deres bageevner på prøve. Hver uge skal den person, der klarer sig dårligst, forlade programmet, og til sidst står kun vinderen tilbage!

programme.title: Den store britiske bagedyst

programme.desc: En hårdkogt PI og hans rookie-sidekick udgør det uligt med partnerskaber, når de undersøger indbyggerne i det landlige Warwickshire og deres hemmeligheder.

programme.title: Den iskolde vildmark
programme.desc: UCOS-teamet genåbner sagen om Sean Docherty, en talentfuld ung digter, hvis brændte lig blev fundet på en kendt gangsters bilkirkegård for ti år siden. Mens detektiv Standing er overbevist om, at mordet har forbindelse til Dochertys kriminelle omgangskreds, er detektiv Lane sikker på, at svaret skal findes i hans digte.

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: QI er et quizshow fyldt med finurlige og overraskende fakta, hvor deltagerne ikke kun belønnes for korrekte svar, men også for svar, der er "ret interessante".

programme.title: George Clarkes National Trust Unlocked
programme.desc: George opdager en af National Trusts mest finurlige bygninger - en bjørnehytte på den 6400 acre store ejendom Killerton i Devon - og graver hemmeligheder og skandaler frem på Baddesley Clinton Hall i Warwickshire.

programme.title: Den store britiske bagedyst

programme.title: Amanda and Alans Italian Job
programme.desc: "Besties Amanda Holden and Alan Carr roll up their sleeves to bring a crumbling Sicilian home back to life. As they embrace the local lifestyle, its demolition and la dolce vita.

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off For Stand Up To Cancer
programme.desc: Celebrities come together for a bake-off in support of a charity for cancer by whipping up a variety of delicious cakes, pastries and other baked goods.

programme.title: Rick Steins Secret France
programme.desc: Rick Stein sets off on a new culinary adventure to search for France’s best-kept gastronomic secrets.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Deep in Alaska, the primal way lives on. Fight the freeze, brave the wild, hold on to your sanity. And winter is no wonderland when temperatures plummet far below zero. This series follows the drama and hardships experienced by Alaskan households in different corners of this merciless territory as they battle to survive, thrive, and live life on their own terms.

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 hours in...
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade returns as Travel Man in a new series of the BAFTA-nominated program. Each episode guides you on how to enjoy a maxi mini-break, showing you the best way to get the most out of each place visited in just 48 hours. It’s a mixture of well-known attractions, some less familiar ones, and some things you might never have imagined.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Airing since 1979, the British series travels the country (with occasional trips to other countries, such as Canada and Australia), bringing together in each location specialists in antiques and fine arts to have them appraise items brought in by local residents, whether they are collectors looking to turn trash into treasure or ordinary folks hoping Grandmas old painting might now fund the kids education. Items featured on the show often have an interesting story attached to them or have some connection to that episodes venue. While some items that are brought in are worth a fortune, others are worthless.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Twelve homebakers take part in a bake off, which will test every aspect of their baking skills as they battle it out to be crowned the Great British Bake Offs Best Amateur Baker. Each episode tests different aspects of their baking skills through a signature bake, a technical challenge, and a showstopper.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off

Each episode tests different aspects of their baking skills through a signature bake, a technical challenge, and a showstopper.

programme.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
programme.desc: In the historic town of Stratford-upon-Avon, eccentric private detectives Luella Shakespeare and Frank Hathaway join forces to crack curious cases and outsmart criminals. With Luella’s intuition and Frank’s street-smart instincts, this unconventional duo tackles mysteries filled with twists, humour, and intrigue, proving that opposites really do make the best crime-solvers.

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: QI is a quiz show packed with quirky and surprising facts where contestants are rewarded not just for correct answers but for responses that are “quite interesting.” The show blends humor, curiosity, and clever banter, encouraging players to think outside the box. Its unique format creates an entertaining and unpredictable experience that celebrates knowledge in all its curious forms.

While some items that are brought in are worth a fortune, others are worthless.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Deep in Alaska, the primal way lives on. Fight the freeze, brave the wild, hold on to your sanity. And winter is no wonderland when temperatures plummet far below zero. This series follows the drama and hardships experienced by Alaskan households in different corners of this merciless territory as they battle to survive, thrive, and live life on their own terms.

programme.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
programme.desc: In the historic town of Stratford-upon-Avon, eccentric private detectives Luella Shakespeare and Frank Hathaway join forces to crack curious cases and outsmart criminals. With Luella’s intuition and Frank’s street-smart instincts, this unconventional duo tackles mysteries filled with twists, humour, and intrigue, proving that opposites really do make the best crime-solvers.

programme.desc: Twelve homebakers take part in a bake off, which will test every aspect of their baking skills as they battle it out to be crowned the Great British Bake Offs Best Amateur Baker. programme.title: Amanda and Alans Italian Job
programme.desc: "Besties Amanda Holden and Alan Carr roll up their sleeves to bring a crumbling Sicilian home back to life. As they embrace the local lifestyle, its demolition and la dolce vita.

programme.title: The Weakest Link Celebrity Specials
programme.desc: Comedian Romesh Ranganathan takes charge of the back-stabbing, big money, game show. Can the contestants create a chain of answers and avoid being the weakest link?

programme.title: Richard Osmans House of Games Night
programme.desc: A group of four famous faces go toe-to-toe testing their general knowledge in a variety of entertaining games. The series includes all the favourite, funny challenges from the House of Games series, with the addition of new games and features. As ever, all of the games are rooted in general knowledge and can be played along at home by viewers.

programme.title: 8 Out Of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Hosted by the ever-witty Jimmy Carr, the stars of 8 Out of 10 Cats team up with celebrity guests to take on the iconic words and numbers game show. Packed with comedy, cleverness, and chaos, this hilarious spin on the classic quiz brings together quick-thinking, laughs, and unpredictable moments. With comedians battling brains and banter, it’s a uniquely entertaining twist that blends panel show fun with the challenge of Countdown.

programme.title: Michael McIntyres Big Show
programme.desc: Michael McIntyres very special comedy entertainment show arrives on Comedy Central, with big stars, big laughs and big surprises!

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon is back in the hosts chair for the fifth series of the hit comedy panel show Would I Lie To You? And as ever, David Mitchell and Lee Mack are the lightning-quick team captains. Over the course of each show, a stellar a cast of celebrity guests reveal amazing stories about themselves, some of which are true, and some of which are not.

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?

programme.title: Robson Green: Worlds Most Amazing Walks
programme.desc: Actor Robson Green takes viewers on an adventure through some of the most incredible and awe-inspiring landscapes on the planet. Each journey is filled with breath-taking vistas, fascinating history and bewitching wildlife, with a new discovery at every turn. Along the way, Robson immerses himself in both the landscapes and the stories of the people he meets, making for powerful and emotional journeys through some of the worlds most beautiful regions.

programme.title: QI

programme.title: Amanda og Alans italienske rønne
programme.desc: Bestevennene Amanda Holden og Alan Carr bretter opp ermene for å gi nytt liv til et forfallent hus på Sicilia. De omfavner den lokale livsstilen mens de river vegger og lever la dolce vita.

programme.title: Amanda og Alans italienske rønne
programme.desc: Bestevennene Amanda Holden og Alan Carr bretter opp ermene for å gi nytt liv til et forfallent hus på Sicilia. De omfavner den lokale livsstilen mens de river vegger og lever la dolce vita.

programme.title: Hele Storbritannia baker - kjendis
programme.desc: Kjendisbakere inntar det berømte teltet og får testet bakeferdighetene for å skaffe penger til kreftforskning.

programme.title: Rick Steins Secret France
programme.desc: Rick Stein reiser til Frankrike for å bevise hvordan nasjonens gastronomiske tiltrekningskraft aldri har vært sterkere. Noen mener det franske kjøkkenet ikke lenger er blant de beste i verden. Denne globetrav-kokken forsøker å finne ut om det er tilfelle.

programme.title: Livet under null
programme.desc: Serie som følger vanskelighetene som fire husstander i Alaska opplever i forskjellige hjørner av dette nådeløse territoriet mens de kjemper for å komme seg gjennom en lang, mørk, iskald vinter. Den enorme amerikanske delstaten Alaska kan skryte av noe av verdens mest dødelige vær, med temperaturer som jevnlig stuper til dødelige -80 Fahrenheit, og fryser utsatte lemmer på minutter. Likevel er det også hjemsted for noen av de tøffeste, mest motstandsdyktige og mest isolerte menneskene i verden. Livet handler om å overleve i møte med ubøyelig vær, knappe ressurser og menneskeetende rovdyr.

programme.desc: Eksperter inviterer publikum til å ta med antikviteter for undersøkelse. Noen opplever at deres «bric-a-brac» er verdt mye mer enn de noen gang har mistenkt.

programme.title: George Clarkes National Trust Unlocked
programme.desc: Arkitekt George Clarke går bak lukkede dører på National Trust-steder, avslører deres mange hemmeligheter og møter menneskene som holder disse arkitektoniske underverkene i gang.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: 12 deltakere konkurrerer om å bli Storbritannias beste amatørbaker. Underveis får de utfordringer der bakekunnskapene deres settes på prøve. Hver uke må den som gjør det dårligst forlate programmet, og til slutt står bare vinneren igjen!

programme.title: Livet under null
programme.desc: Serie som følger vanskelighetene som fire husstander i Alaska opplever i forskjellige hjørner av dette nådeløse territoriet mens de kjemper for å komme seg gjennom en lang, mørk, iskald vinter. Den enorme amerikanske delstaten Alaska kan skryte av noe av verdens mest dødelige vær, med temperaturer som jevnlig stuper til dødelige -80 Fahrenheit, og fryser utsatte lemmer på minutter. Likevel er det også hjemsted for noen av de tøffeste, mest motstandsdyktige og mest isolerte menneskene i verden. Livet handler om å overleve i møte med ubøyelig vær, knappe ressurser og menneskeetende rovdyr.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Asia Trade
programme.desc: Bloomberg The Asia Trade - bringing global investors everything you need to know as the trading day begins in Asia. Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping markets — from tech, to geopolitics, and the world’s energy transition.

programme.title: Bloomberg: The China Show
programme.desc: Trending topics, politics, policy and technology news in China is presented to global investors with a unique perspective of the worlds second-largest economy.

programme.title: Insight with Haslinda Amin
programme.desc: The definitive guide for global news audiences to get the complete picture on the biggest story of the day, through probing interviews and nuanced conversations.

programme.title: Bloomberg Horizons Middle East and Africa
programme.desc: Linking the market drivers from overnight in the US and across Asia into the regions trading day, with deep dive analysis of the top business, energy and geopolitical stories shaping decisions.

programme.title: Bloomberg Daybreak: Europe
programme.desc: Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And well tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

programme.title: Bloomberg: The Opening Trade
programme.desc: Everything you need to know as markets open across Europe. We break down the biggest stories of the day and speak to guests with skin in the game. Hosted by Anna Edwards, Guy Johnson and Kriti Gupta.

programme.title: The Pulse with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: The Pulse with Francine Lacqua is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics. Based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance
programme.desc: Daily conversations with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. Hosted by Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern.

programme.title: Bloomberg Open Interest
programme.desc: Matt Miller, Katie Greifeld and Sonali Basak deliver the market-moving news you need to know to get a jump start on the US trading day.

programme.title: Bloomberg Technology
programme.desc: The only daily live technology program with a focus on breaking news, market-moving reporting and analysis of global technology companies and stories.

programme.title: Bloomberg Real Yield
programme.desc: Focusing on global issues and events that directly affect debt markets. Host Jonathan Ferro discusses stories from the fixed income world with the biggest names in the field.

programme.title: Bloomberg: Balance of Power
programme.desc: Host David Westin invites expert guests to speak about the intersection of politics and business in the United States and around the world.

programme.title: Bloomberg Businessweek Daily
programme.desc: Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec bring you reporting from the magazine that helps global leaders stay ahead, plus insight on the people, companies and trends shaping todays complex economy.

programme.title: Bloomberg Markets: The Close
programme.desc: This fast-paced programme is the quintessential market close show leading up to the final minutes and seconds before the closing bell on Wall Street with the latest news, data and expert analysis.

programme.title: Bloomberg: Balance of Power
programme.desc: Host David Westin invites expert guests to speak about the intersection of politics and business in the United States and around the world.

programme.title: Bloomberg Wall Street Week
programme.desc: Bloomberg anchor David Westin is joined by economists, policy makers, chief executive officers, and influential and thought-provoking leaders for a round table discussion over the stock markets and various geopolitical topics.

programme.title: Best of the Bloomberg Women, Money and Power Event
programme.desc: Highlights of the event which brings together the most influential female voices in finance from around the world to discuss the biggest themes facing the future of business.

programme.title: The Mishal Husain Show
programme.desc: Mishal Husain, one of Britains best interviewers, brings her signature blend of curiosity and tenacity to weekly conversations with world leaders, business titans and cultural icons.

programme.title: Leaders with Francine Lacqua: The Podcast
programme.desc: Join Francine Lacqua as she speaks with CEOs and other industry leaders to discover what drives them, their definition of success and how they are shaping their companies amid a fast-changing world.

programme.title: Best of Bloomberg Invest 2026
programme.desc: A recap of Bloomberg Invest New York, the flagship event in Bloomberg Lives 2026 series, featuring interviews with leaders in asset management, banking, private capital and wealth. Hosted by Dani Burger.

programme.title: The David Rubenstein Show
programme.desc: Philanthropist and financier David Rubenstein uncovers inside stories from the most influential minds in business.

programme.title: Bloomberg Originals
programme.desc: Bloomberg Originals offers bold takes for curious minds on today’s biggest topics. Covering stories you haven’t seen and viewpoints you haven’t heard, you’ll discover cinematic, data-led documentaries that investigate the intersection of business and culture. Exploring every angle of climate change, technology, finance, sports and beyond, Bloomberg Originals is business as you’ve never seen it.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: I programmet følger vi familien Kilcher, der lever et ekstraordinært liv midt i Alaskas barske natur. De har ingen moderne bekvemmeligheder som varme eller VVS, og de overlever ved enten at dyrke deres egen mad eller gå på jagt i vildnisset. Kilcher har levet på deres jord i fire generationer, og alle familiemedlemmer ved præcis, hvordan de skal forberede sig på de lange, hårde vintre, som altid hærger her på på kanten af verden.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: Three teenage girls from Beverly Hills attempt to balance their lives as students with their undercover work as super-spies for an elite international agency, battling an array of bizarre criminals.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe
programme.desc: The series follows the adventures of Ivandoe, the young prince of the forest who is on a quest for the magical Golden Feather of the fearsome Eagle King. Ivandoe and his dedicated squire, a small bird named Bert discover new and mysterious areas of the forest and an array of peculiar creatures along the way.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe
programme.desc: The series follows the adventures of Ivandoe, the young prince of the forest who is on a quest for the magical Golden Feather of the fearsome Eagle King. Ivandoe and his dedicated squire, a small bird named Bert discover new and mysterious areas of the forest and an array of peculiar creatures along the way.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: Gumball’s world is pretty run-of-the-mill. He’s chased around school by a T-Rex. He has a friend named Anton who’s a piece of toast. He’s got a crush on Penny, a peanut with antlers. His dad is a 6’4” bunny. His mom works at a Rainbow Factory. And his brother is a goldfish named Darwin. Yup, everything looks perfectly normal.

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: The mystical Jade Armor is a legendary superhero. And now, it is Lan Jun’s turn to be Jade Armor. Even she can’t quite believe her destiny is to be this epic hero! With the help of her friends, Theo and Alisha and the mystical Beasticons that accompany the Armor, Lan Jun is thrust into a series of action-packed adventures. Each day, she must contend with both an evil array of super villains and the very real trials of teenage life.

programme.title: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball
programme.desc: Welcome back to Elmore, where the laws of reality are a joke, and family life is anything but ordinary. Whether hes battling an evil fast-food empire, facing off against a sentient AI in love with his mom, or trying to stop Banana Joe from wearing pants, Gumball Watterson drags his brother Darwin, sister Anais, and the rest of the town of Elmore along for the ride.

programme.title: Looney Tunes Cartoons
programme.desc: Folks, have ya heard? Your favorite Looney Tunes characters are back! Featuring updated stories and everyone’s favorite characters, these all-new animated episodes revitalize the iconic series known and loved for decades. Back to their old tricks are Bugs Bunny, Daffy Duck, Porky Pig, and other marquee Looney Tunes characters who promise to delight audiences young and old with their zany adventures, slapstick comedy, and madcap energy. Get ready to have some fun – that’s all, folks!

programme.title: Looney Tunes Cartoons
programme.desc: Folks, have ya heard? Your favorite Looney Tunes characters are back! Featuring updated stories and everyone’s favorite characters, these all-new animated episodes revitalize the iconic series known and loved for decades. Back to their old tricks are Bugs Bunny, Daffy Duck, Porky Pig, and other marquee Looney Tunes characters who promise to delight audiences young and old with their zany adventures, slapstick comedy, and madcap energy. Get ready to have some fun – that’s all, folks!

programme.title: Tiny Toons Looniversity
programme.desc: Tiny Toons Looniversity follows Babs and Buster Bunny, Sweetie Bird, Hamton J. Pig, and Plucky Duck as they learn what it takes to be a professional toon under the tutelage of Bugs Bunny, Daffy Duck and other looney legends.

programme.title: Goat Girl
programme.desc: GOAT GIRL is a quirky coming-of-age comedy about Gigi, raised by goats, tackling her biggest challenge: surviving school and making human friends.

programme.title: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball
programme.desc: Welcome back to Elmore, where the laws of reality are a joke, and family life is anything but ordinary. Whether hes battling an evil fast-food empire, facing off against a sentient AI in love with his mom, or trying to stop Banana Joe from wearing pants, Gumball Watterson drags his brother Darwin, sister Anais, and the rest of the town of Elmore along for the ride.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: Gumball’s world is pretty run-of-the-mill. He’s chased around school by a T-Rex. He has a friend named Anton who’s a piece of toast. He’s got a crush on Penny, a peanut with antlers. His dad is a 6’4” bunny. His mom works at a Rainbow Factory. And his brother is a goldfish named Darwin. Yup, everything looks perfectly normal.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: From Warner Bros. Animation, these teen titans are on the go! Right after they make a sandwich or play some video games. Wait, theres laundry to do? ("Not it!") After that, theyll definitely go fight some crime. Maybe. Dont miss the return of Robin, Starfire, Raven, Beast Boy and Cyborg - teen super heroes who are totally unsupervised!.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek
programme.desc: A clever little boy from a suburban town in Maryland loves exploring and playing at his neighbourhood creek, where he convinces his two best friends to join him on various journeys that turn their normal afternoons into magical adventures.

programme.title: Regular Show
programme.desc: Mordecai – a sarcastic blue jay, and Rigby – a somewhat responsible raccoon, are best friends. They even work together at a park owned by Pops, a big lollipop-headed guy. Which seems normal enough. They’ve got a cranky gumball machine for a boss and they work alongside a Zen-like yeti named Skips. Yep. Everything is as regular as can be.

programme.title: Uncle Grandpa
programme.desc: Uncle Grandpa is everyone on Earths magical uncle AND grandpa, who travels around helping people and changing their lives forever. He goes on adventures and solves problems with the help of his friends, Mr. Gus, Pizza Steve, Giant Realistic Flying Tiger and Belly Bag. Together, they ride in The RV, Uncle Grandpas magical home on wheels that can drive on its own and contains an endless playhouse of strange and crazy rooms.

programme.title: Adventure Time
programme.desc: Its one crazy adventure after another for human boy, Finn, and his best friend, Jake, a 28-year old dog with magical powers. Theyre out to have the most fun possible and they sure do find it exploring the Land of Ooo! Whether its saving Princess Bubblegum, battling zombie candy, taunting the Ice King or rocking out with Marceline the Vampire Queen, with Finn and Jake its always ADVENTURE TIME!

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: Three teenage girls from Beverly Hills attempt to balance their lives as students with their undercover work as super-spies for an elite international agency, battling an array of bizarre criminals.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe
programme.desc: The series follows the adventures of Ivandoe, the young prince of the forest who is on a quest for the magical Golden Feather of the fearsome Eagle King. Ivandoe and his dedicated squire, a small bird named Bert discover new and mysterious areas of the forest and an array of peculiar creatures along the way.

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: The mystical Jade Armor is a legendary superhero. And now, it is Lan Jun’s turn to be Jade Armor. Even she can’t quite believe her destiny is to be this epic hero! With the help of her friends, Theo and Alisha and the mystical Beasticons that accompany the Armor, Lan Jun is thrust into a series of action-packed adventures. Each day, she must contend with both an evil array of super villains and the very real trials of teenage life.

programme.title: Looney Tunes Cartoons
programme.desc: Folks, have ya heard? Your favorite Looney Tunes characters are back! Featuring updated stories and everyone’s favorite characters, these all-new animated episodes revitalize the iconic series known and loved for decades. Back to their old tricks are Bugs Bunny, Daffy Duck, Porky Pig, and other marquee Looney Tunes characters who promise to delight audiences young and old with their zany adventures, slapstick comedy, and madcap energy. Get ready to have some fun – that’s all, folks!

programme.title: Bunnicula
programme.desc: Bunnicula is an animated comedy series based on the bestselling childrens book of the same name. The series features the paranormal comedy adventures of Bunnicula the vampire rabbit, Chester the paranoid cat, and Harold the loyal family dog. Together, our heroes protect their owner Mina and the city of New Orleans from spooky supernatural creatures… including Bunnicula himself!

programme.title: Uncle Grandpa
programme.desc: Uncle Grandpa is everyone on Earths magical uncle AND grandpa, who travels around helping people and changing their lives forever. He goes on adventures and solves problems with the help of his friends, Mr. Gus, Pizza Steve, Giant Realistic Flying Tiger and Belly Bag. Together, they ride in The RV, Uncle Grandpas magical home on wheels that can drive on its own and contains an endless playhouse of strange and crazy rooms.

programme.title: Adventure Time
programme.desc: Its one crazy adventure after another for human boy, Finn, and his best friend, Jake, a 28-year old dog with magical powers. Theyre out to have the most fun possible and they sure do find it exploring the Land of Ooo! Whether its saving Princess Bubblegum, battling zombie candy, taunting the Ice King or rocking out with Marceline the Vampire Queen, with Finn and Jake its always ADVENTURE TIME!

His dad is a 6’4” bunny. His mom works at a Rainbow Factory. And his brother is a goldfish named Darwin. Yup, everything looks perfectly normal.

programme.title: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball
programme.desc: Welcome back to Elmore, where the laws of reality are a joke, and family life is anything but ordinary. Whether hes battling an evil fast-food empire, facing off against a sentient AI in love with his mom, or trying to stop Banana Joe from wearing pants, Gumball Watterson drags his brother Darwin, sister Anais, and the rest of the town of Elmore along for the ride.

programme.title: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball
programme.desc: Welcome back to Elmore, where the laws of reality are a joke, and family life is anything but ordinary. Whether hes battling an evil fast-food empire, facing off against a sentient AI in love with his mom, or trying to stop Banana Joe from wearing pants, Gumball Watterson drags his brother Darwin, sister Anais, and the rest of the town of Elmore along for the ride.

programme.title: Regular Show
programme.desc: Mordecai – a sarcastic blue jay, and Rigby – a somewhat responsible raccoon, are best friends. They even work together at a park owned by Pops, a big lollipop-headed guy. Which seems normal enough. They’ve got a cranky gumball machine for a boss and they work alongside a Zen-like yeti named Skips. Yep. Everything is as regular as can be.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: Three teenage girls from Beverly Hills attempt to balance their lives as students with their undercover work as super-spies for an elite international agency, battling an array of bizarre criminals.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe
programme.desc: The series follows the adventures of Ivandoe, the young prince of the forest who is on a quest for the magical Golden Feather of the fearsome Eagle King. Ivandoe and his dedicated squire, a small bird named Bert discover new and mysterious areas of the forest and an array of peculiar creatures along the way.

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: The mystical Jade Armor is a legendary superhero. And now, it is Lan Jun’s turn to be Jade Armor. Even she can’t quite believe her destiny is to be this epic hero! With the help of her friends, Theo and Alisha and the mystical Beasticons that accompany the Armor, Lan Jun is thrust into a series of action-packed adventures. Each day, she must contend with both an evil array of super villains and the very real trials of teenage life.

programme.title: Europe Early Edition
programme.desc: Start your trading day with Europe Early Edition as major European financial centers take the reins of global markets. programme.title: Squawk Box Europe
programme.desc: CNBCs flagship show in Europe sets you up with everything you need to know for the European business day. Anchors Geoff Cutmore, Steve Sedgwick and Karen Tso engage in unscripted and dynamic debate on the days top stories. programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: “American Greed” goes inside the dark side of the American Dream - where money seduces, power corrupts, and smooth criminals will stop at nothing to get rich. Their complex scams leave victims lives in shambles. Each episode is a deep dive into the minds and actions of heartless crooks who live lives most people can only dream of.

programme.title: Leaders Playbook
programme.desc: Leader’s Playbook” is an in-depth series that features exclusive, candid interviews with America’s top CEOs and explores the leadership philosophies and the strategic and personal decisions that have shaped today’s most influential companies. Hosted by CNBC’s Senior Media and Tech Correspondent Julia Boorstin, each episode offers a rare glimpse into the mindset of visionary leaders, revealing how they navigate challenges, drive innovation, and build success.

programme.title: Built For Billions
programme.desc: "Built for Billions" uncovers the blueprints behind the world’s biggest tech empires—how they scale, monetize, and dominate markets. From innovative revenue models to dramatic turnarounds, each episode reveals lessons in resilience, leadership, and reinvention that power profitability in the digital age.

programme.title: Nightsleeper
programme.desc: 400 Kilometer in vier Stunden von Glasgow nach London: Der Night Sleeper verspricht eine entspannte Reise uber Nacht. Vor der Abfahrt kommt es zu einem Zwischenfall - beherzt greift ein Reisender (Joe Cole) bei einem Taschendiebstahl ein. Als der Zug losfahrt, ahnt niemand, dass dies der Auftakt einer dramatischen Reise ist. Im Zug befindet sich ein verdachtiges Steuergerat – und es gibt zunachst keinerlei Verbindung nach drauSSen! Wahrend im Night Sleeper die Angst wachst, ubernimmt in London Cyberexpertin Abby (Alexandra Roach) den Einsatz.

programme.title: Nightsleeper
programme.desc: Auf einem Bildschirm der britischen Bahn meldet sich der Hacker: Er nennt sich der „Driver“ und habe ab sofort die Kontrolle uber Zuge und das Bahnsystem! Einsatzleiterin Abby (Alexandra Roach) kann inzwischen uber das Satellitentelefon eines Passagiers Kontakt mit den verangstigten Reisenden im Nightsleeper aufnehmen. Sie hofft auf die Unterstutzung durch den Mitreisenden Joe Roag (Joe Cole) – doch mit dem Ex-Detective gibt es ein Problem. Als es zu einem Stopp kommt, ahnt niemand, was der „Driver“ vorhat …

programme.title: Nightsleeper
programme.desc: Der Nightsleeper rast wie von Geisterhand durch die Nacht. Einsatzleiterin Abby (Alexandra Roach) vermutet, dass der Zug aus einem Abteil heraus gesteuert wird. Doch von wem? Ist ein Passagier der „Driver“ – oder noch jemand unbemerkt an Bord? Abby vertraut gegen den Willen ihrer Vorgesetzten Erin (Lois Chimimba) ihrem kantigen Ex-Mentor „Pev“ (David Threlfall). Unterdessen liegen an Bord die Nerven blank – und der Bohrinselarbeiter Danny Geoghan (Daniel Cahill) beschlieSSt, die Fahrt auf eigene Faust zu stoppen.

programme.title: Nightsleeper
programme.desc: Der „Driver“ bestraft gnadenlos jeden Versuch, ihm die Kontrolle zu entreiSSen. Der Zug ist wie eine Waffe - und niemand weiSS, was das Ziel ist! Ein Bekennerschreiben erhoht den Druck auf Abby (Alexandra Roach) - ebenso wie die Spannungen zwischen den Sicherheitsdiensten. Der Security Service-Offizier Hudson (Jonjo O’Neill) stellt die Einsatzleiterin infrage und trifft heimlich eine waghalsige Entscheidung. Wahrend der Zug immer schneller fahrt, kommt es zu einem gefahrlichen Zwischenfall …

programme.title: Nightsleeper
programme.desc: Joe Roag (Joe Cole) sucht mit der Waffe in der Hand nach dem blinden Passagier im Zug. Als die anderen dazukommen, eskaliert die Situation und ein Schuss fallt. Wahrend Abby (Alexandra Roach) ihrer Chefin misstraut, gerat sie selbst ins Fadenkreuz ihrer Kollegen. Nur „Pev“ (David Threlfall) halt zu ihr – doch ein weiterer Fehler erhoht den Zeitdruck. Die Zuginsassen mochten nicht tatenlos in ihr Schicksal rasen. Warren (James Cosmo), ein pensionierter Ex-Bahner, hat eine Idee. Obwohl diese gefahrlich ist, machen alle mit …

programme.title: Nightsleeper
programme.desc: Der Nightsleeper rast auf London zu – eine Katastrophe droht. Wahrend ihre Vorgesetzte Erin (Lois Chimimba) keine Erfolgsaussichten mehr sieht, wagt Abby (Alexandra Roach) einen riskanten Einsatz. Auch Joe Roag (Joe Cole) versucht an Bord das Leben der letzten Passgiere zu retten. Unterdessen kommt heraus, wen der „Driver“ im Zug fur sich arbeiten lieSS. Doch wer ist das Phantom? Und worum geht es ihm wirklich?

programme.title: HobbyMania - Tausch mit mir dein Hobby!
programme.desc: Zwei Kids tauschen jeweils ihr Hobby und mussen eine Challenge bestehen. Zu Beginn jeder Episode stellt jeder Protagonist sein Hobby vor, weist den Tauschpartner ein und vereinbart mit ihm ein konkretes Ziel (oder Herausforderung), welches am Ende der Folge eingelost beziehungsweise aufgelost wird. Jeder Tauschpartner ist also im Film einmal sowohl Ausprobierender als auch Coach. Die Protagonisten entdecken in der „HobbyMania“ neue Lebensumfelder, probieren komplett Neues aus, wechseln die Perspektive und schlieSSen neue Freundschaften.

programme.title: Shaun das Schaf
programme.desc: Shaun, Bitzer und der Rest der Clique stellen auf der Mossy Bottom Farm allerlei tierischen Unfug an. Der Frieden im traumhaften Tal verwandelt sich in Chaos auf der wilden Weide, sobald der schelmische Shaun seine Herde zu diversem Blodsinn anstiftet und Hutehund Bitzer an der Nase herumfuhrt – naturlich immer nur, wenn der Farmer gerade wegschaut.

programme.title: Pia und die wilde Natur
programme.desc: Pia wandert auf dem Ätna in Sizilien. Extremere Lebensbedingungen gibt es kaum. Wie kommen die dortigen Pflanzen und Tiere damit zurecht? Manche sind besonders widerstandsfahig, wiederum andere darauf spezialisiert, von Vulkanausbruchen zerstorte Flachen besonders schnell zu besiedeln.Pia lernt auSSerdem, wie Lava entsteht, was ein "Vulkankind" ist, und wie manche Tiere uns Menschen vielleicht helfen konnen, bevorstehende Ausbruche fruhzeitig zu erkennen.

programme.title: Pia und die Haustiere
programme.desc: Weltweit ist der Deutsche Schaferhund nach wie vor einer der beliebtesten Rassehunde. Der ausdauernde und wachsame Hund ist vielseitig einsetzbar, unter anderem als Hutehund, Polizeihund, Drogenspurhund oder im Schutzdienst.

programme.title: Checkerin Marina
programme.desc: Die Checker bekommen Verstarkung: Marina erganzt die Checker Welt. Freu dich auf die erste Checkerin in Team! Checker Reportagen.

programme.title: Wissen macht Ah!
programme.desc: „Wissen macht Ah!“ versorgt KlugscheiSSer – und alle, die es werden wollen – mit Wissen von Ah! wie Astronautenpups bis Z wie Zitronenbatterie. In einer knappen halben Stunde erklaren euch Clarissa und Ralph die Welt und schrecken dabei vor nichts zuruck. Wenn es der Antwort auf eine Frage nutzt, informieren sie euch auch aus dem Home Office, backen kostliche Einhornhaufen und haben einfach fur jedes Thema das passende Outfit. Ah!

programme.desc: Ein sonniger spater Nachmittag. Kein Grauen, keine Krahen, kein Unheil weit und breit. Burkhard "Butsch" Schulz hat seine schwere Verletzung auskuriert und fuhlt sich vitaler als je zuvor. Und auch Viola Delbruck hat ihre Damonen gut genug im Griff, um beinahe optimistisch und lebensfroh zu wirken. Gemeinsam schleppen die beiden Mobel in Butschs neue Wohnung, frotzeln uber dies und jenes, als ein gellender Schrei durch das Treppenhaus schallt. programme.title: The Great Antiques Challenge
programme.desc: Antiques dealers go head-to-head to find the perfect pieces for homeowners and small businesses. Hunting down items from across the country, the dealers will display their finds for the client to choose from. But will the winning dealer make any profit?

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: The hosts team up to find and flip serviceable used classic cars. Mike scours the Internet and local trade rags for bargain-priced modern classics needing attention. Edd China (and in later seasons, Ant Anstead) applies the elbow grease to bring the cars up to a nearly new condition, allowing Mike to "sell them on" for a profit.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Modern day treasure hunter Drew Pritchard is one of the UKs top decorative antique dealers. Always on the hunt for that elusive gem, Drew travels the length and breadth of the country in search of weird and wonderful objects. The bigger the hoard of forgotten antiques and dusty furniture, the happier Drew is!

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: Classic Cars
programme.desc: Salvage aficionado, Drew Pritchard teams up with Turbo Pickers Paul Cowland for an epic motoring mission. They scour the UK, buying, restoring and selling classic cars.

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: In the face of an economic meltdown, six men will risk everything to strike it rich mining for gold. Todd Hoffman, along with his father, is leading a group of greenhorn miners in search of the American dream and a new frontier. Gold fever is back, and the rush is on. The gold miners of the Yukon are back to put everything on the line in the hopes of striking it rich. With new miners, new claims and new machines, the stakes are higher than ever!

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: Josh Gates has decided its time to reallyexplore the dark side of our world. To this end, Gates has put together a team to undertake investigations delving into realms beyond the unknown. Hes picked Michelle Tate and Phil Torres to mount unprecedented expeditions into the unexplained and perhaps ...unexplainable.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: Master of mystery Josh Gates explores a treasure trove of mind-bending mysteries, carefully curated during his two decades of travelling the globe. Josh travels through history on a search to uncover new evidence and answers to the worlds most captivating unexplained mysteries, and true stories that defy explanation, offering stunning revelations and surprising new insights.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Intrigued by legendary mysteries and driven by curiosity, Josh Gates is on a mission for answers. "Expedition Unknown" chronicles his global adventures as he investigates iconic unsolved events, lost cities, buried treasures and other puzzling stories. Armed with a degree in archaeology, a quick wit and a thirst for action, Gates investigates recent developments before embarking on a detailed exploration. Whether hes trekking through Fiji in search of Amelia Earharts remains or diving the deep seas of Panama to locate Captain Morgans pirate ship, Gates roughshod expeditions lead him one step closer to the truth.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs
programme.desc: Få et indblik i en verden fyldt med gennemtænke forhandlinger og banebrydende restaureringer, når Robert Kulp og Mike Whiteside byder på boliger og bygninger som ingen ande vil vove at kaste sig ud i. Holdet arbejder hårdt, for at forsikre at fremtidige generationer kan nyde håndværk fra fortidens generationer.

programme.title: Blowing Up History
programme.desc: Hvordan blev eksempelvis pyramiderne bygget og hvad ligger skjult inde i deres hemmelige kamre? Hvordan står Parthenon oprejst mod jordskælv? Og hvilke hemmeligheder ligger gemt under mayaernes templer i Chichen Itza? Ved hjælp af banebrydende teknologi, ser denne serie nærmere på disse antikke og ikoniske vidundere, for at afsløre deres skjulte kamre og hvælvinger, og trækker dem fra hinanden - sten for sten.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water
programme.desc: Dakota Boys vender tilbage til McKinley Creek for at søge efter guld. Dustin lokaliserer det perfekte sted, som han mener indeholder mange nuggets.

programme.title: Ant Anstead: Born Mechanic
programme.desc: Ant Anstead er en dygtig mekaniker, der restaurerer og sælger klassiske biler. Pengene, han tjener på at sælge bilerne, går til at finansiere renoveringen af den 500 år gamle gård, han har købt til sin mor og far.

programme.title: Lastbilchauffører i øde områder
programme.desc: Følg chaufførerne, når de skal transportere deres værdifulde last over den australske ødemark så hurtigt som muligt, mens de sikrer sig, at de kommer frem og tilbage i et stykke. Mød blandt andet chaufførlegenden Steve Grahame, der fragter livsvigtigt generatorudstyr til en værdi af 3 mio. dollar til et øde samfund i den nordvestlige del af Australien i Kalumburu.

programme.desc: Ved Ridler-teknikprøven kæmper Dave og Kev for at løse et problem med gearet. Da udstillingen åbner, får de chancen for at se konkurrenterne.

programme.title: Inside The Arrest
programme.desc: Efter at en niårig pige er blevet fanget i krydsilden i en bandekrig, rykker et specialvåbenhold ind for at arrestere hendes morder.

programme.title: Ant Anstead: Born Mechanic
programme.desc: Ant Anstead er en dygtig mekaniker, der restaurerer og sælger klassiske biler. Pengene, han tjener på at sælge bilerne, går til at finansiere renoveringen af den 500 år gamle gård, han har købt til sin mor og far.

programme.title: Beringstredets gull
programme.desc: Gullfeberen stiger, men dette edle metallet ligger på bunnen av Beringhavet. En håndfull personer er villige til å sette alt på spill for å hente det opp til overflaten.

programme.title: Port Control: Spain
programme.desc: Et innblikk i de daglige utfordringene til de hardtarbeidende menneskene som har ansvaret for driften av noen av de travleste havnene i Spania.

programme.title: Port Control: Spain

programme.title: Dino Hunters
programme.desc: Ankylosaurus, Triceratops, or Velociraptor: Where cattle graze today, dinosaurs ruled the earth until 65 million years ago. Now, the remains of these prehistoric giants lie buried in sedimentary rock, waiting to be unearthed. Dino hunters like Clayton Phipps, Jared Hudson, and Mike Harris are taking on the task. Ranchers and cowboys want to turn these prehistoric treasures into cash! The fossil discoveries are also important for science. Using 3D scanners and high-tech computer models, experts are bringing the hidden world of dinosaurs back to life.

programme.desc: A team of tech-savvy boat captains, treasure hunters, salvage divers and Bermuda Triangle experts seek to unravel some of the most enduring mysteries in the world.

programme.title: In Search Of Monsters
programme.desc: Experts explore the latest evidence, eyewitness encounters and active investigations while unveiling their theories about infamous monsters and their origins.

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: Josh Gates has decided its time to reallyexplore the dark side of our world. To this end, Gates has put together a team to undertake investigations delving into realms beyond the unknown. Hes picked Michelle Tate and Phil Torres to mount unprecedented expeditions into the unexplained and perhaps ...unexplainable.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: Many items that make up the modern world are the result of sophisticated engineering and production processes. How do they do it?

programme.desc: Many items that make up the modern world are the result of sophisticated engineering and production processes. How do they do it?

programme.title: Familien Green I Storbyen
programme.desc: “Familien Green i storbyen” er en animations-komedie/eventyr-serie, der følger 10-årige Cricket Greens skæve og sjove eventyr. Den gavtyveagtige og optimistiske knægt fra landet flytter til storbyen med sin familie - storesøster Tilly, farmand Bill og bedstemor Alice - som mildt sagt ikke passer ind der. Crickets medfødte nysgerrighed og gåpåmod fører ham og hans familie ud på store eventyr og lige i hjerterne på hans nye naboer.

programme.title: Hamster og Grete
programme.desc: Grete Grant-Gomez og hende kælehamster "Hamster", får superkræfter af nogle rumvæsner, og det store ansvar at være "helte på jorden!" Gretes storebror, Kevin, blev derimod overset af rumvæsnerne, og er derfor kun "superhelte-påhæng". Men han er alligevel tit hjernen bag deres missioner! Nu må Hamster and Grete redde veden fra den ene superskurk efter den anden, imens de holder deres sande identititeter skjult!

programme.title: Hamster og Grete

programme.title: Phineas og Ferb
programme.desc: Phineas og Ferb vil gøre hver eneste dag i deres sommerferie helt spektakulær! Hver dag finder de på nye fantasirige opfindelser, alt imens deres misundelige storesøster, Candace, prøver at sladre om dem til mor. De kan bygge en rutsjebane i baghaven, surfe på forstadens tidevandsbølger, eller rejse tilbage til forhistorien. Samtidig lever familiens ikke alt for smarte husdyr, næbdyret Perry, et dobbeltliv som hemmelig agent, der i hvert afsnit kæmper mod den ondskabsfulde Dr. Doofenshmirtz.

programme.title: Spidey og hans fantastiske venner

Hvis Spidey befinder sig i en presset situation, der kræver endnu mere superheltekraft, så kan du være sikker på, at en Avenger-ven melder sig på banen. programme.title: Miraculous: Ladybug and Cat Noir på eventyr
programme.desc: Ladybug har mistet mirakelæsken og kwamierne. Nu har hun kun sin egen Mirakulus og Cat Noir har sin. Shadow Moth, som nu går under navnet Monark, har aldrig været tættere på at sejre. Nu er han i stand til at give Mirakulus-evner til sine akumatiserede undersåtter, og på den måde skabe afsindigt stærke superskurke. Men vores helte, som igen samarbejder som makkerpar, viser sig at være mere forbundne end nogensinde før. Denne nye prøvelse vil sætte et stort aftryk på deres indbyrdes relation og deres hverdag. Intet vil blive det samme igen.

programme.desc: Bluey er en seks-årig glad og energisk australsk Blue Heeler hund, der elsker at lege og forvandler familiens hverdag til fantastiske eventyr, der gavner både Blueys fantasi og hendes mentale, fysiske og følelsesmæssige styrke.

programme.title: Max og Mule
programme.desc: Fedtmule er alenefar og flytter med sin søn, Max, ind i huset ved siden af sin gamle skolekammerat Sorteper. Sortepers søn, Per Junior, og Max bliver bedste venner og gør næsten alting sammen.

programme.title: Et godt grin!
programme.desc: Anders narrer Chip og Chap til at skovle sne, men slaget vender.

programme.title: Lilo and Stitch: Serien
programme.desc: Hvis Stitch var Dr. Jumbas elskede Experiment 626, hvad skete der så med den anden 625? Jumbas resterende eksperiment er landet over hele Hawaii i dehydrerede bælg. De aktiveres, når de kommer i vandet, og ligesom Stitch har hvert eksperiment sine egne talenter for ødelæggelse og komedie. Lilo og Stitchs mission er at fange Stitchs "fætre", inden de ender i hænderne på den onde Jacques von Hamsterviel og hans tjener Gantu, vende eksperimenterne fra ondskab til godt til ondt og finde steder, hvor de kan høre til og bidrage til samfundet.

programme.title: Et godt grin!
programme.desc: Mickey forsøger at gøre Minnies have ryddelig til trods for en livlig hvirvelvind.

programme.title: Phineas og Ferb
programme.desc: Phineas og Ferb vil gøre hver eneste dag i deres sommerferie helt spektakulær! Hver dag finder de på nye fantasirige opfindelser, alt imens deres misundelige storesøster, Candace, prøver at sladre om dem til mor. De kan bygge en rutsjebane i baghaven, surfe på forstadens tidevandsbølger, eller rejse tilbage til forhistorien. Samtidig lever familiens ikke alt for smarte husdyr, næbdyret Perry, et dobbeltliv som hemmelig agent, der i hvert afsnit kæmper mod den ondskabsfulde Dr. Doofenshmirtz.

programme.title: Phineas og Ferb
programme.desc: Phineas og Ferb vil gøre hver eneste dag i deres sommerferie helt spektakulær! Hver dag finder de på nye fantasirige opfindelser, alt imens deres misundelige storesøster, Candace, prøver at sladre om dem til mor. De kan bygge en rutsjebane i baghaven, surfe på forstadens tidevandsbølger, eller rejse tilbage til forhistorien. Samtidig lever familiens ikke alt for smarte husdyr, næbdyret Perry, et dobbeltliv som hemmelig agent, der i hvert afsnit kæmper mod den ondskabsfulde Dr. Doofenshmirtz.

programme.title: Kiff
programme.desc: Serien handler om Kiff, et optimistisk egern, hvis livsappetit fører hende ud på utallige eventyr rundt om i hjembyen, sammen med hendes afslappede bedsteven, Barry. I en verden, hvor dyr og magiske særlinge takler hverdagen sammen, styrer duoen gennem skole, kammeratskaber og deres ofte excentriske lokalsamfund.

programme.title: Miraculous: Ladybug and Cat Noir på eventyr
programme.desc: Ladybug har mistet mirakelæsken og kwamierne. Nu har hun kun sin egen Mirakulus og Cat Noir har sin. Shadow Moth, som nu går under navnet Monark, har aldrig været tættere på at sejre. Nu er han i stand til at give Mirakulus-evner til sine akumatiserede undersåtter, og på den måde skabe afsindigt stærke superskurke. Men vores helte, som igen samarbejder som makkerpar, viser sig at være mere forbundne end nogensinde før. Denne nye prøvelse vil sætte et stort aftryk på deres indbyrdes relation og deres hverdag. Intet vil blive det samme igen.

programme.title: Miraculous: Ladybug and Cat Noir på eventyr
programme.desc: Ladybug har mistet mirakelæsken og kwamierne. Nu har hun kun sin egen Mirakulus og Cat Noir har sin. Shadow Moth, som nu går under navnet Monark, har aldrig været tættere på at sejre. Nu er han i stand til at give Mirakulus-evner til sine akumatiserede undersåtter, og på den måde skabe afsindigt stærke superskurke. Men vores helte, som igen samarbejder som makkerpar, viser sig at være mere forbundne end nogensinde før. Denne nye prøvelse vil sætte et stort aftryk på deres indbyrdes relation og deres hverdag. Intet vil blive det samme igen.

programme.title: Vampirina: Teenage Vampire
programme.desc: Vee forlader Transsylvanien for at tage på kostskole for at forfølge sine musikalske drømme. Da hun holder sin vampyridentitet skjult, truer uventede forhindringer med at sende hende tilbage til skyggerne.

programme.title: Magi efter Waverly Place
programme.desc: Billie, en magtfuld ung troldmand i centrum for en mystisk profeti, bliver sendt til at leve i den dødelige verden med den eneste troldmandslærer, der kan hjælpe hende med at kontrollere sine kræfter - Justin Russo.

programme.title: Familien Green I Storbyen
programme.desc: “Familien Green i storbyen” er en animations-komedie/eventyr-serie, der følger 10-årige Cricket Greens skæve og sjove eventyr. Den gavtyveagtige og optimistiske knægt fra landet flytter til storbyen med sin familie - storesøster Tilly, farmand Bill og bedstemor Alice - som mildt sagt ikke passer ind der. Crickets medfødte nysgerrighed og gåpåmod fører ham og hans familie ud på store eventyr og lige i hjerterne på hans nye naboer.

programme.title: Familien Green I Storbyen

programme.title: Hamster og Grete
programme.desc: Grete Grant-Gomez og hende kælehamster "Hamster", får superkræfter af nogle rumvæsner, og det store ansvar at være "helte på jorden!" Gretes storebror, Kevin, blev derimod overset af rumvæsnerne, og er derfor kun "superhelte-påhæng". Men han er alligevel tit hjernen bag deres missioner! Nu må Hamster and Grete redde veden fra den ene superskurk efter den anden, imens de holder deres sande identititeter skjult!

programme.title: Superkitties
programme.desc: Superkillingerne - Bitten, Rosa, Kvik og Mester - er tilbage, og de er superenergiske! Teamet er på en mission for at rette op på uret og gøre verden til et venligere og mere potetastisk sted.

programme.title: Mickeys klubhus+
programme.desc: Mickey og hans venner byder alle velkommen i klubhuset til helt nye og plussede eventyr fyldt med sange, latter, fikse fingre og sjove nye overraskelser!

programme.title: Spidey og hans fantastiske venner
programme.desc: Spidey, vores yndlings spindsvinger, slår sig sammen med Ghost-Spider (Gwen Stacey) og Miles Morales for at skabe Spidey-teamet med hjælp fra Spideys komiske, men loyale spider-bot, TRACE-E. Hvis Spidey befinder sig i en presset situation, der kræver endnu mere superheltekraft, så kan du være sikker på, at en Avenger-ven melder sig på banen. Om det bare er Spidey-teamet, eller om der er en Avenger med på sidelinjen, så samarbejder disse superhelte altid for at redde dagen!

programme.title: Iron Man og hans fantastiske venner
programme.desc: "Marvels Iron Man og hans utrolige venner" følger supergenierne og bedstevennerne mens de arbejder sammen om at løse problemer og beskytte deres by.

programme.title: Mickeys klubhus+

programme.title: Miraculous: Ladybug and Cat Noir på eventyr
programme.desc: Ladybug har mistet mirakelæsken og kwamierne. Nu har hun kun sin egen Mirakulus og Cat Noir har sin. Shadow Moth, som nu går under navnet Monark, har aldrig været tættere på at sejre. Nu er han i stand til at give Mirakulus-evner til sine akumatiserede undersåtter, og på den måde skabe afsindigt stærke superskurke. Men vores helte, som igen samarbejder som makkerpar, viser sig at være mere forbundne end nogensinde før. Denne nye prøvelse vil sætte et stort aftryk på deres indbyrdes relation og deres hverdag. Intet vil blive det samme igen.

programme.title: Vampirina: Teenage Vampire
programme.desc: Vee forlader Transsylvanien for at tage på kostskole for at forfølge sine musikalske drømme. Da hun holder sin vampyridentitet skjult, truer uventede forhindringer med at sende hende tilbage til skyggerne.

programme.title: Magi efter Waverly Place
programme.desc: Billie, en magtfuld ung troldmand i centrum for en mystisk profeti, bliver sendt til at leve i den dødelige verden med den eneste troldmandslærer, der kan hjælpe hende med at kontrollere sine kræfter - Justin Russo.

programme.title: Miraculous: Ladybug and Cat Noir på eventyr
programme.desc: Ladybug har mistet mirakelæsken og kwamierne. Nu har hun kun sin egen Mirakulus og Cat Noir har sin. Shadow Moth, som nu går under navnet Monark, har aldrig været tættere på at sejre. programme.title: Spidey og hans fantastiske venner
programme.desc: Spidey, vores yndlings spindsvinger, slår sig sammen med Ghost-Spider (Gwen Stacey) og Miles Morales for at skabe Spidey-teamet med hjælp fra Spideys komiske, men loyale spider-bot, TRACE-E. Hvis Spidey befinder sig i en presset situation, der kræver endnu mere superheltekraft, så kan du være sikker på, at en Avenger-ven melder sig på banen. Om det bare er Spidey-teamet, eller om der er en Avenger med på sidelinjen, så samarbejder disse superhelte altid for at redde dagen!

programme.title: Iron Man og hans fantastiske venner
programme.desc: "Marvels Iron Man og hans utrolige venner" følger supergenierne og bedstevennerne mens de arbejder sammen om at løse problemer og beskytte deres by.

programme.title: Mickeys klubhus+
programme.desc: Mickey og hans venner byder alle velkommen i klubhuset til helt nye og plussede eventyr fyldt med sange, latter, fikse fingre og sjove nye overraskelser!

programme.title: Superkitties
programme.desc: Superkillingerne - Bitten, Rosa, Kvik og Mester - er tilbage, og de er superenergiske! Teamet er på en mission for at rette op på uret og gøre verden til et venligere og mere potetastisk sted.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey er en seks-årig glad og energisk australsk Blue Heeler hund, der elsker at lege og forvandler familiens hverdag til fantastiske eventyr, der gavner både Blueys fantasi og hendes mentale, fysiske og følelsesmæssige styrke.

programme.title: Phineas og Ferb
programme.desc: Phineas og Ferb vil gøre hver eneste dag i deres sommerferie helt spektakulær! Hver dag finder de på nye fantasirige opfindelser, alt imens deres misundelige storesøster, Candace, prøver at sladre om dem til mor. De kan bygge en rutsjebane i baghaven, surfe på forstadens tidevandsbølger, eller rejse tilbage til forhistorien. Samtidig lever familiens ikke alt for smarte husdyr, næbdyret Perry, et dobbeltliv som hemmelig agent, der i hvert afsnit kæmper mod den ondskabsfulde Dr. Doofenshmirtz.

programme.title: Phineas og Ferb
programme.desc: Phineas og Ferb vil gøre hver eneste dag i deres sommerferie helt spektakulær! Hver dag finder de på nye fantasirige opfindelser, alt imens deres misundelige storesøster, Candace, prøver at sladre om dem til mor. De kan bygge en rutsjebane i baghaven, surfe på forstadens tidevandsbølger, eller rejse tilbage til forhistorien. Samtidig lever familiens ikke alt for smarte husdyr, næbdyret Perry, et dobbeltliv som hemmelig agent, der i hvert afsnit kæmper mod den ondskabsfulde Dr. Doofenshmirtz.

programme.title: Familien Green I Storbyen
programme.desc: “Familien Green i storbyen” er en animations-komedie/eventyr-serie, der følger 10-årige Cricket Greens skæve og sjove eventyr. Den gavtyveagtige og optimistiske knægt fra landet flytter til storbyen med sin familie - storesøster Tilly, farmand Bill og bedstemor Alice - som mildt sagt ikke passer ind der. Crickets medfødte nysgerrighed og gåpåmod fører ham og hans familie ud på store eventyr og lige i hjerterne på hans nye naboer.

programme.title: Kiff
programme.desc: Serien handler om Kiff, et optimistisk egern, hvis livsappetit fører hende ud på utallige eventyr rundt om i hjembyen, sammen med hendes afslappede bedsteven, Barry. I en verden, hvor dyr og magiske særlinge takler hverdagen sammen, styrer duoen gennem skole, kammeratskaber og deres ofte excentriske lokalsamfund.

programme.title: Miraculous: Ladybug and Cat Noir på eventyr

programme.title: Hamster og Grete
programme.desc: Grete Grant-Gomez og hende kælehamster "Hamster", får superkræfter af nogle rumvæsner, og det store ansvar at være "helte på jorden!" Gretes storebror, Kevin, blev derimod overset af rumvæsnerne, og er derfor kun "superhelte-påhæng". Men han er alligevel tit hjernen bag deres missioner! Nu må Hamster and Grete redde veden fra den ene superskurk efter den anden, imens de holder deres sande identititeter skjult!

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: “Big City Greens” is an animated comedy-adventure series which follows the offbeat adventures of 10-year-old Cricket Green, a mischievous and optimistic country boy who moves to the big city with his wildly out of place family – older sister Tilly, father Bill and Gramma Alice. Cricket’s natural curiosity and enthusiasm lead him and his family on epic journeys and into the hearts of his new neighbours.

programme.title: Hamster and Gretel
programme.desc: Gretel Grant-Gomez and her pet hamster, "Hamster," are given superpowers by aliens and the big responsibility of being "Heroes on Earth!" Gretels teen brother, Kevin, on the other hand, was overlooked by the aliens, and is stuck being "superhero adjacent." However, he is often the brains behind each mission! Now, Hamster and Gretel must save the world from one supervillain after another, all while keeping their identities a secret!

programme.title: Hamster and Gretel
programme.desc: Gretel Grant-Gomez and her pet hamster, "Hamster," are given superpowers by aliens and the big responsibility of being "Heroes on Earth!" Now, Hamster and Gretel must save the world from one supervillain after another, all while keeping their identities a secret!

programme.title: Phineas And Ferb
programme.desc: Phineas Flynn and his resourceful stepbrother, Ferb Fletcher, happily set out to conquer boredom and make every day of their 104-day summer vacation count. Among their fun-filled projects are building a full-scale roller coaster, creating a new season called swinter, becoming overnight pop music sensations, building a backyard beach complete with a surf competition, and traveling back in time to the Jurassic period.

programme.title: Goof Troop
programme.desc: Goofy is a single father raising his son, Max in Spoonerville. As it happens, Goofy and Max end up moving in next door to Goofys high school friend: Pete, a used car salesman and owner of Honest Petes Used Cars; Petes wife Peg, a real estate agent; and their two children, son P.J. (Pete Jr.) and younger daughter Pistol. Petes son PJ and Max become best friends practically doing everything together.

programme.title: Disneys Have a Laugh!
programme.desc: Join Donald, Mickey, Pluto and friends for classic animated adventures

programme.title: Lilo and Stitch: The Series
programme.desc: If Stitch was Dr. Jumba’s beloved Experiment 626, what happened to the other 625? Jumba’s remaining experiments have landed all over Hawaii in the form of dehydrated pods. The experiments become activated when submerged in water and, much like Stitch, each experiment has its own specific talents for destruction...and comedy. Lilo and Stitch’s mission is to catch Stitch’s "cousins" before they fall into the clutches of the evil Dr. Jacques von Hamsterviel and his henchman Gantu, turn the experiments’ natures from bad to good, and find places where each can belong and contribute to the community.

programme.title: Hamster and Gretel
programme.desc: Gretel Grant-Gomez and her pet hamster, "Hamster," are given superpowers by aliens and the big responsibility of being "Heroes on Earth!" Gretels teen brother, Kevin, on the other hand, was overlooked by the aliens, and is stuck being "superhero adjacent." However, he is often the brains behind each mission! Now, Hamster and Gretel must save the world from one supervillain after another, all while keeping their identities a secret!

programme.title: Phineas And Ferb
programme.desc: Phineas Flynn and his resourceful stepbrother, Ferb Fletcher, happily set out to conquer boredom and make every day of their 104-day summer vacation count. Among their fun-filled projects are building a full-scale roller coaster, creating a new season called swinter, becoming overnight pop music sensations, building a backyard beach complete with a surf competition, and traveling back in time to the Jurassic period.
